name: storage3
documentation:
# Storage-py

Python Client library to interact with Supabase Storage.



## How to use

As it takes some effort to get the headers. We suggest that you use the storage functionality through the main [Supabase Python Client](https://github.com/supabase-community/supabase-py)


```python3
from storage3 import create_client

url = "https://<your_supabase_id>.supabase.co/storage/v1"
key = "<your api key>"
headers = {"apiKey": key, "Authorization": f"Bearer {key}"}

# pass in is_async=True to create an async client
storage_client = create_client(url, headers, is_async=False)

storage_client.list_buckets()
```

### Uploading files
When uploading files, make sure to set the correct mimetype by using the `file_options` argument:
```py
storage_client.from_("bucket").upload("/folder/file.png", file_object, {"content-type": "image/png"})
```
If no mime type is given, the default `text/plain` will be used.

classes.name: storage3.utils.StorageException
documentation: Error raised when an operation on the storage API fails.

classes.name: storage3.exceptions.StorageApiError
documentation: Error raised when an operation on the storage API fails.

Parameters

id
    The unique identifier of the bucket
Manage storage buckets and files.

classes.name: storage3._sync.bucket.SyncStorageBucketAPI

methods.name: storage3._sync.bucket.SyncStorageBucketAPI.list_buckets
documentation: Retrieves the details of all storage buckets within an existing product.

methods.name: storage3._sync.bucket.SyncStorageBucketAPI.get_bucket
documentation:
Retrieves the details of an existing storage bucket.

Parameters
----------
id
    The unique identifier of the bucket you would like to retrieve.

methods.name: storage3._sync.bucket.SyncStorageBucketAPI.create_bucket
documentation:
Creates a new storage bucket.

Parameters
----------
id
    A unique identifier for the bucket you are creating.
name
    A name for the bucket you are creating. If not passed, the id is used as the name as well.
options
    Extra options to send while creating the bucket. Valid options are `public`, `file_size_limit` and
    `allowed_mime_types`.

methods.name: storage3._sync.bucket.SyncStorageBucketAPI.update_bucket
documentation:
Update a storage bucket.

Parameters
----------
id
    The unique identifier of the bucket you would like to update.
options
    The properties you want to update. Valid options are `public`, `file_size_limit` and
    `allowed_mime_types`.

methods.name: storage3._sync.bucket.SyncStorageBucketAPI.empty_bucket
documentation:
Removes all objects inside a single bucket.

Parameters
----------
id
    The unique identifier of the bucket you would like to empty.

methods.name: storage3._sync.bucket.SyncStorageBucketAPI.delete_bucket
documentation:
Deletes an existing bucket. Note that you cannot delete buckets with existing objects inside. You must first
`empty()` the bucket.

Parameters
----------
id
    The unique identifier of the bucket you would like to delete.
This class abstracts access to the endpoint to the Get, List, Empty, and Delete operations on a bucket

classes.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.create_signed_upload_url
documentation:
Creates a signed upload URL.

Parameters
----------
path
    The file path, including the file name. For example `folder/image.png`.

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.upload_to_signed_url
documentation:
Upload a file with a token generated from {meth}`.create_signed_url`

# Parameters

path

: The file path, including the file name

token

: The token generated from {meth}`.create_signed_url`

file

: The file contents or a file-like object to upload

file_options

: Additional options for the uploaded file

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.create_signed_url
documentation:
Parameters
----------
path
    file path to be downloaded, including the current file name.
expires_in
    number of seconds until the signed URL expires.
options
    options to be passed for downloading or transforming the file.

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.create_signed_urls
documentation:
Parameters
----------
path
    file path to be downloaded, including the current file name.
expires_in
    number of seconds until the signed URL expires.
options
    options to be passed for downloading the file.

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.get_public_url
documentation:
Parameters
----------
path
    file path, including the path and file name. For example `folder/image.png`.

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.move
documentation:
Moves an existing file, optionally renaming it at the same time.

Parameters
----------
from_path
    The original file path, including the current file name. For example `folder/image.png`.
to_path
    The new file path, including the new file name. For example `folder/image-copy.png`.

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.copy
documentation:
Copies an existing file to a new path in the same bucket.

Parameters
----------
from_path
    The original file path, including the current file name. For example `folder/image.png`.
to_path
    The new file path, including the new file name. For example `folder/image-copy.png`.

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.remove
documentation:
Deletes files within the same bucket

Parameters
----------
paths
    An array or list of files to be deletes, including the path and file name. For example [`folder/image.png`].

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.list
documentation:
Lists all the files within a bucket.

Parameters
----------
path
    The folder path.
options
    Search options, including `limit`, `offset`, `sortBy` and `search`.

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.download
documentation:
Downloads a file.

Parameters
----------
path
    The file path to be downloaded, including the path and file name. For example `folder/image.png`.

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin._upload_or_update
documentation:
Uploads a file to an existing bucket.

Parameters
----------
path
    The relative file path including the bucket ID. Should be of the format `bucket/folder/subfolder/filename.png`.
    The bucket must already exist before attempting to upload.
file
    The File object to be stored in the bucket. or a async generator of chunks
file_options
    HTTP headers.

methods.name: storage3._sync.file_api.SyncBucketActionsMixin.upload
documentation:
Uploads a file to an existing bucket.

Parameters
----------
path

    The bucket must already exist before attempting to upload.
file
    The File object to be stored in the bucket. or a async generator of chunks
file_options
    HTTP headers.
Functions needed to access the file API.
